creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for the problem, but I forgot to pay attention to the patch, I hope
it's clear that my mail ended with:

and: cd /usr/ports/x11-fonts/indic-ttf; make -V EGO1; make -V EGHO2 

Now:

> We have several ports in the tree which use OPTIONS and just include
> bsd.port.mk (e.g. cad/geda, or graphics/swfdec).

Yes you are right, in fact they are broken; changing the settings doesn't
change nothing.

I'm sorry for this long mail but I hope this can help us to make a better port for
very beautiful fonts, than it was at the born.

Best regards,

Giuseppe Pilichi
